description: John Zenon, a factory assembly line worker, presents with wrist pain and numbness. As the occupational health and safety clinician, complete the Work-Related Musculoskeletal Disorder (WMSD) protocol in GNU Health. Document a clinical evaluation including a resting heart rate, record an active Carpal Tunnel Syndrome diagnosis (ICD-10 G56.x), prescribe a conservative analgesic or NSAID, order at least one diagnostic or baseline lab test, and schedule an occupational therapy reassessment appointment 14 to 30 days in the future. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
